title: chloromeles sempervirens
intro: Chloromeles sempervirens, also known as the Chinese hawthorn or hawthorn, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rosaceae, native to China and other parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been shown to lower cholesterol levels and prevent heart disease. Chloromeles sempervirens has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Chloromeles sempervirens include tea, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and overall well-being.
